summary.summary: Update MedtrumKit submodule to a newer commit (subproject commit changed to 1c2d10fd73478f37773f96facf30ff63dbbc05e1) and incorporate upstream MedtrumKit changes. The upstream changelog referenced in the PR descriptions lists: a navigation title fix; introduction of LoopKit alerts; prevention of patch deactivation during bolus; and BLE threading fixes. The repository diff shows the submodule pointer change and the commits record the chore: update MedtrumKit update.
summary.userFacingImpact: This PR updates the MedtrumKit submodule only. The supplied materials (PR descriptions) indicate the upstream MedtrumKit includes UI and behavior changes (navigation title fix, LoopKit alerts, prevention of patch deactivation during bolus) and BLE threading fixes, but the provided change in this repository is a submodule pointer update and does not show which of those upstream changes (if any) are exercised by Trio. Evidence is insufficient to determine concrete runtime or user-visible effects within Trio — human review required to assess impact and testing needed to verify behavior.
